title: apium nodiflorum var. repens
intro: Apium nodiflorum var. repens, also known as Creeping Celery, is a perennial herb of the carrot family native to Europe and Western Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Creeping Celery include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Traditionally, this herb is prepared as an infusion or tincture, and is also used in various herbal preparations, such as salves and ointments, to support skin health and soothe minor injuries.
